hero.label: Welcome
hero.heading: Expert Dermatological Care for Every Skin Type
hero.subtext: Experience comprehensive skin health solutions from board-certified dermatologists using the latest medical technology and proven treatment methods.

services.heading: Comprehensive Skin Care Services
services.subtext: From medical dermatology to cosmetic procedures, we offer complete solutions for your skin health and beauty goals.

services.title: Medical Dermatology
services.description: Expert diagnosis and treatment of skin conditions including acne, eczema, psoriasis, and skin cancer screening.

services.title: Cosmetic Procedures
services.description: Advanced aesthetic treatments including Botox, dermal fillers, chemical peels, and laser therapy for rejuvenation.

services.title: Laser Treatments
services.description: State-of-the-art laser technology for hair removal, skin resurfacing, pigmentation correction, and scar reduction.

services.title: Skin Cancer Screening
services.description: Comprehensive mole mapping and skin cancer detection using advanced dermoscopy and digital imaging.

about.heading: Board-Certified Dermatology Experts
about.text: With over 20 years of combined experience, our team of board-certified dermatologists is dedicated to providing exceptional care. We stay at the forefront of dermatological advances, combining medical expertise with a compassionate approach to help you achieve optimal skin health.

testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell
testimonials.quote: Dr. Roberts completely transformed my skin. After years of struggling with acne, I finally found a treatment plan that works. The entire team is professional, caring, and knowledgeable.

testimonials.name: Michael Chen
testimonials.quote: The laser treatment for my sun damage was incredible. The results exceeded my expectations, and the procedure was comfortable and quick. Highly recommend DermaCare!

testimonials.name: Emma Thompson
testimonials.quote: I felt heard and understood from my first consultation. The personalized approach to treating my eczema has made such a difference in my quality of life.

contact.heading: Schedule Your Consultation
contact.description: Take the first step toward healthier, more beautiful skin. Our team is ready to create a personalized treatment plan just for you.
contact.address: 123 Medical Plaza, Suite 200, Beverly Hills, CA 90210

seo.title: DermaCare Clinic | Expert Dermatological Care
seo.description: Leading dermatology clinic offering advanced skin treatments, cosmetic procedures, and expert care. Board-certified dermatologists providing personalized solutions for all your skin health needs.
